case_title: CHRIS DRESSEL et al vs. RODNEY MONROE FULTZ et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RODNEY MONROE FULTZ AKA RODNEY M. FULTZ AKA RODNEY FULTZ

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODNEY MONROE FULTZ AKA RODNEY M. FULTZ AKA RODNEY FULTZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1105 BUSH ST, #B-1, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL APR-05-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PL. TO PAY DEF. $500 UPON SIGNING STIP & $500 AFTER DEF. VACATES FOR CONSTRUCTION WORK PERFORMED ON PREMISES. ALL BACK RENT & DAMAGES, COSTS & ATTY FEES WVD. DEF. HAS NO SEC. DEP ON FILE & NO ACCOUNTING NECESSARY. NO FURTHER STAYS. DEF. WAIVES ALL CLAIMS AGAINST PL. SEE FILE.
